schema_basis: LongMemEval 5-bucket attribute ontology + augmentations (current_projects, recent_pains, communication_style)

temporal_anchor.now_label: current point at end of arc

demographic.employer: Brújula Logistics (Series B last-mile delivery startup, ~120 employees, HQ Mexico City)
demographic.manager_start: Daniela Otero (eng manager, leaves company month 8)
demographic.manager_end: Roberto Sánchez (replaces Daniela month 8, more political)

lifestyle.diet: vegetarian for 4 years (decision triggered by watching dad's cardiac surgery)
diet_quirks: addicted to ramen at 'Nudo' on Av. Álvaro Obregón

exercise.primary: Kickboxing at Atlas Box CDMX (Colonia Juárez)
exercise.secondary: yoga on Sundays at Camila's insistence (resentful)
exercise.instructor: Coach Esteban 'Profe' Domínguez (61, ex-pro kickboxer from Tijuana)

lifestyle.sleep: night owl, sleeps 1am-9am ideally; insomnia worsens over arc, hits peak month 16-17
lifestyle.substances: no smoking, drinks mezcal/wine moderately (1-2x per week), 4-6 cups of yerba mate daily
lifestyle.religion: lapsed Catholic, secular but lights candles for dead grandmother on her birthday
hobbies: vinyl collecting (Latin jazz, ~150 records, Beny Moré obsession)
reading (currently Ted Chiang's Exhalation, before that Borges)
woodworking (took up month 14 for chess board project)
lifestyle.tech_relationship: early adopter for productivity tools, late adopter for social media; hates Twitter/X, posts on Mastodon occasionally
communication_quirks: drops Spanish into English when tired
writes long when frustrated, short when excited

situational_context.housing: rents 2BR apartment in Roma Norte with Camila, 5th floor walk-up, rent went from 28k MXN to 33k MXN month 9 (18% increase shock)
neighborhood_quirks: upstairs neighbor 'Doña Marta' bakes bread at 5am
cantina 'La Polar' below — noise on Friday nights
situational_context.transport: 2018 Honda CR-V (nicknamed 'La Torta'), bicycle for short trips, metro line 1 for work
situational_context.finances: makes 95k USD eq, saves 20% in CETES + USD index, has ~45k USD saved, 8k USD remaining on student loan from ITESM, no other debt
situational_context.current_relationship: 5 years with Camila Ferreira (Argentinean-Brazilian architect at Foster + Partners CDMX office, age 30)
situational_context.relationship_status_arc: stable but stressed by mother-in-law's death at arc start; rough patch month 7-8 over kid timing
situational_context.pet: Australian Cattle Dog 'Nube' (blue heeler, female, born Feb 2024, adopted month 6 of arc from rescue 'Hocicos Felices')
situational_context.current_living_arrangements: Seb + Camila + Nube; Camila's father Hugo (62, retired widower) visits monthly from São Paulo since wife's death
professional_situation_changes: month 6: takes tech lead role on RouteOpt rust migration
month 12: turns down internal transfer to Brújula's Bogotá office
month 17: starts MIT Media Lab masters application

stable_past: second job: Wizeline 2017-2021 (consulting on USA banking projects)
moved Guadalajara → CDMX 2 years before arc
father had triple bypass surgery 2022 (catalyst for vegetarianism)
abuela materna 'Mama Lupita' died 2019 (still mourns, lights candles)
met Camila at friend's wedding in Oaxaca, late 2021

arc_events_chronological.event: Mother-in-law Beatriz Ferreira dies of pancreatic cancer in São Paulo. Seb + Camila fly out for funeral.
Return to CDMX. Numb period. Camila on bereavement leave.
Seb promoted to Senior. Salary bump 18%. Awkward bc Camila grieving.
Buys Lelit Mara X espresso machine — guilt purchase post-promo.
Starts pose-estimation kickboxing form analyzer side project. TensorFlow then pivots to MediaPipe.
Postgres meltdown in prod — 4-hour outage, post-mortem.
Adopts Nube (dog) from rescue. Same week kicks off RouteOpt rust migration as tech lead.
Rough patch with Camila over kid-timing conversation. Couples therapy starts (3 sessions).
Brown belt earned at Atlas Box. Manager Daniela leaves; Roberto Sánchez replaces her. Seb's birthday — turns 33.
Rent increase from landlord — 28k→33k MXN. Argument with landlord about hot water.
Mom Isabela calls re: lump on neck. CT scan scheduled. Seb flies to Guadalajara. Lower back tweak from sparring same week.
Mom's lump benign — lipoma. Pause pose-estimation side project. Buys vinyl: 'Beny Moré con la Banda Gigante'.
Camila wins Pritzker Prize student-mentor nomination via her firm. Industry buzz. Seb declines Bogotá transfer.
Brother Mateo announces engagement to Sofía Aguirre. Trip planned to Tijuana. Nube terrified by month-13 thunderstorms.
Starts cedar chess board project for Camila's dad Hugo's 70th. First woodworking — buys Festool plunge router. Wood from 'Maderería El Roble' in Toluca.
Black belt — first dan — earned at Atlas Box. Profe Esteban hands belt personally. Pablo records on phone. Family flies in.
RouteOpt ships to staging. Performance: Python 340ms p95 → Rust 38ms p95. Insomnia hits worst point. Chess board has warped piece — re-plane needed.
Chess board complete, gifted at Hugo's 70th party in CDMX. Hugo cries. MIT Media Lab masters app drafted.
MIT app submitted (today). Recommendation letters from Daniela (former mgr) + ITESM thesis advisor. Currently waiting. Considering future of career.

biggest_fears: Camila moving back to São Paulo for family
becoming his father (workaholic + closed off emotionally)
biggest_regrets: didn't visit abuela Lupita in her last year before 2019 death
took job at Wizeline for the money in 2017

everyday: ThinkPad T480 running NixOS (personal — for side projects)
iPhone 15 Pro (resentful about it, was Pixel before)
battered black Atlas Box gym bag with brown-belt patch (then black-belt patch month 15)
belongings.vehicle: 2018 Honda CR-V silver — nicknamed 'La Torta' — 87k km, brake pads need changing month 11
belongings.prized_possession: yerba mate bombilla cup, gift from abuela materna Mama Lupita (2017), engraved 'Seb' on the rim — nearly lost it month 4 in a taxi, recovered
belongings.vinyl_collection: ~150 records, Latin jazz heavy. Top-shelf: Astor Piazzolla 'Libertango', Beny Moré 'con la Banda Gigante', Caetano Veloso 'Transa'
belongings.tools_woodworking: Festool plunge router (TS 55 REQ), set of Veritas chisels, cedar planks from Maderería El Roble (Toluca)
belongings.kitchen: Lelit Mara X espresso machine (acquired month 3), Made-In carbon steel skillet, family-recipe molcajete inherited from abuela
belongings.instruments: Yamaha FG800 acoustic guitar (rarely plays), harmonica he can't really play

current_projects.name: RouteOpt rust migration
current_projects.current_state_at_arc_end: shipped to staging month 16, prod rollout pending
current_projects.stack: Rust + Axum + Tokio + sqlx (PostGIS extension) + Redis

blockers_history.blocker: tokio-postgres doesn't natively handle PostGIS geography type — wrote custom encoder
memory regression — Tokio task spawning per request leaked
load test reveals Tokio runtime starvation under burst load — bumped to multi-thread runtime

team: Carla Vela (senior, on parental leave months 11-15)

current_projects.name: Kickboxing form analyzer (side project)
current_projects.current_state_at_arc_end: paused — code on GitHub private, may revive
current_projects.purpose: auto-feedback on stance, hip rotation, kick chamber from phone video

blockers_history.blocker: TensorFlow pose estimation too slow on CPU; pivoted to MediaPipe
video alignment between cameras inconsistent; abandoned multi-cam

current_projects.users_tested: Pablo + 3 gym friends, ~12 sparring sessions logged

current_projects.name: Cedar chess board for Hugo's 70th
current_projects.specs: 20-inch cedar board, walnut squares, magnetic chess pieces (3D printed bases), beeswax finish

blockers_history.blocker: warping in one corner from humidity — re-glued and clamped

current_projects.name: MIT Media Lab masters application — Affective Computing group
current_projects.personal_statement_theme: ML for nonverbal feedback in physical training

recent_pains.label: lower back pain from kickboxing
recent_pains.treatment: physical therapy at Clínica Querétaro starting month 11, partially helps

recent_pains.label: new manager Roberto Sánchez — political vibes
dog Nube panic attacks during thunderstorms
kid-timing conversation with Camila — recurring tension
dad Hugo's mild heart issues — angina occasional

communication_style_with_ai.code_pasting: frequent — pastes errors and stack traces verbatim
communication_style_with_ai.venting_pattern: long when frustrated, short when buzzing on caffeine
communication_style_with_ai.self_aware: occasionally apologizes for venting then redirects ('anyway sorry — back to the question')
communication_style_with_ai.callback_pattern: naturally references prior topics ('that postgres thing I mentioned', 'remember the rust migration')
communication_style_with_ai.no_meta_commentary: never says 'as you know' or 'just for context — I'm a Mexican backend engineer'; facts come out organically through situation
communication_style_with_ai.occasional_drunk_or_3am_msg: rare but exists — typos increase, more emotional
